subject: A mechanical silver-and-copper drake construct in mid-flight, wings spread wide against a pale cloudy sky
description: A burnished metallic drake — Saheeli's craftwork — banks through an overcast sky with wings fully extended. Its body is articulated plates of polished silver and warm copper, with visible filigree, riveted seams, and ornamental scrollwork along the wing membranes. The construct's long neck arches as it turns, jaws slightly parted, with delicately etched ribbing along the wing struts catching diffuse daylight. Below and around it, soft white-grey clouds break apart to reveal hints of distant landscape. The palette is dominated by cool silvers, warm bronze highlights, and pale sky-blue mist. Composition is a wide aerial shot with the drake centered and angled toward the viewer's left, conveying lift and motion.
foreground: metallic drake construct with outstretched filigreed wings
background: overcast pale sky with breaking clouds and faint distant terrain
emotion: alert, predatory poise; mid-bank with parted jaws
